search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results limited to lastzwiki.com. Prioritized concrete wiki/guide pages over home pages. No result should be treated as proof for player-facing mechanics or costs.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with character list, levels, and hero equipment sections. Good for hero discovery and equipment cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero names, factions, and gear references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page covering badge costs by level across laboratory categories. Useful for research discovery and cost cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and badge cost tables.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English hub page linking to heroes, research, alliance, buildings, and strategy sections. Good entry point for discovery, not a mechanic source by itself.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to topic pages and related guides.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages found within the allowed domain for the provided query.

search_records.search_notes: Web search returned no matching pages on the allowed domain within the query scope and freshness window.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed or discoverable pages matched the allowed-domain query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to lastz.fandom.com as requested. Results emphasize event themes tied to research and hero progression. No single result is sufficient to verify player-facing mechanics or rewards.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle; includes Age of Science for tech research and Hero Initiative for hero upgrades and tickets.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event theme matches research or hero upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Cycle order and timing by day
Point sources for Age of Science and Hero Initiative

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Research building page; shows Laboratory unlock and that it is used to research Technologies.
results.primary_user_job: Confirm where technology research happens and related unlocks.

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview; identifies hero classes and the main ways heroes gain power.
results.primary_user_job: Map the hero system and upgrade-related terminology.
claims_to_verify: Power sources like levels, stars, skills, equipment
Relation to event tasks and progression

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com as required. No matching pages were found for the approved query within the requested source domain and freshness window.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed Packsify page matched the explicit Last Z gear guide query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to mmediamreza.com and surfaced several Last Z-specific guide pages suitable for topic discovery and cross-validation. Generic homepage and non-Last-Z content were excluded.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Shooter Camp. Covers training role, unlock requirements, cap, speed, power, and an upgrade table.
results.primary_user_job: Player wants troop-building and upgrade data.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Laboratory. Covers research role, HQ linkage, and second lab unlock context.
results.primary_user_job: Player wants research progression and lab unlock details.

results.title: Last Z Formations Guide: Troop Capacity, Buffs & Levels - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Formations. Covers march size, combat buffs, power, and HQ-based unlocks.
results.primary_user_job: Player wants formation limits and combat bonuses.
